payload.expected: Complete parallel Standards and Spec reviews, apply findings, rerun affected review axes, and close the reviewer agents.
payload.observed: Both review axes completed and all findings were fixed, but no reviewer-agent close operation was available after the agents reached terminal status.
payload.consequence: Reviewer cleanup could not use the expected close step, although review completion and final implementation were unaffected.
payload.workaround_taken: Confirmed every reviewer was terminal through the live agent listing and recorded that no close capability was available.
